overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, ascending a concrete stairway and traversing an elevated pedestrian bridge through Night City at night. The clip transitions from enclosed concrete interiors to an open-air walkway with panoramic views of neon-lit skyscrapers, heavy traffic, and flying vehicles.

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete stairway
pedestrians descending the stairs pass by the camera

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide concrete stairway with teal ambient lighting, passing other pedestrians descending

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with integrated horizontal light strips on walls
smooth gray concrete walls with embedded linear lighting
smooth gray concrete walls with embedded linear lighting
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a wide concrete stairway bathed in teal artificial light. The enclosed space features smooth concrete walls with integrated linear lighting. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction as the camera climbs steadily toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with seating and vending area

events.description: exits stairway into upper covered walkway with tiled flooring
passing a burning barrel with seated pedestrians nearby

agents.ego_description: walking through a littered covered walkway, turning past concrete benches and a fire barrel

notable_agents.action: person in pink shirt sitting on concrete bench
person warming hands near the burning barrel

entered.detail: concrete tile flooring scattered with trash and debris
built-in concrete seating with integrated planters
metal barrel with open flames providing warmth
illuminated purple and red automated vending machines

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into a covered pedestrian walkway with tiled floors littered with debris. The camera passes built-in concrete benches where people sit, including one person near a burning barrel. Purple vending machines glow in the distance as the walkway turns.

scene_state.functional_zone: vending machine corridor connecting to elevated bridge

events.description: turns right past brightly lit vending machines
descends then ascends a short flight of stairs

agents.ego_description: walking past vending machines, then descending and ascending stairs while approaching the elevated bridge corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading down then immediately up
enclosed corridor with glass windows overlooking the city

segments.scene_description: This segment transitions through a corridor lined with glowing vending machines and advertising screens. The camera passes the vending area, descends and ascends a short stairway, and enters a corridor with glass windows revealing the neon city outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with panoramic cyberpunk city views

events.description: corridor opens to reveal expansive cyberpunk cityscape views
flying vehicles pass by at eye level outside the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated pedestrian bridge while observing the neon-lit cityscape, heavy traffic, and flying vehicles below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead along the bridge

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate signage for Orbital Air mounted on a skyscraper
transparent safety barriers along the edge of the elevated walkway
multi-level road system with heavy traffic visible below
glowing holographic advertisements including green Burrito signage
tall towers covered in illuminated signs and windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of Night City from an elevated pedestrian bridge. The camera moves along the walkway past glass railings, revealing the iconic Orbital Air sign, dense flying traffic, and towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The scene is dominated by cool teal and vibrant neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a sterile, enclosed concrete interior into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban panorama. It begins with a steady climb up a wide concrete stairway bathed in teal artificial light, moving past sparse pedestrians within smooth, linear-lit walls. As the camera emerges from the stairs, the environment opens into a covered pedestrian walkway littered with debris and punctuated by glowing purple vending machines and burning barrels. The scene then shifts through a corridor of advertising screens and short stairways before passing through glass windows that reveal the city outside. Finally, the camera moves onto an elevated pedestrian bridge, where the enclosed architecture gives way to a breathtaking view of towering skyscrapers, the Orbital Air sign, and dense flying traffic under a vibrant neon sky.
